deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH; uv run uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/api --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
preDeployCommand: sh -c 'export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH; cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head'
